[[BLOCK:slide48_shape2]]
•   The selected model, based on AICc (A corrected version of Akaike’s Information Criterion, imposing a greater penalty for additional parameters in small sample sizes), is the model at Step 6.

•   The best predictors are BMI, BP, HDL (High-density lipoprotein cholesterol, often referred to as 'good cholesterol'), LTG, and Glucose.
